personalInfo.name: Alish Pawn
personalInfo.title: Frontend Web Developer & BCA Student
personalInfo.heroDescription: Passionate about creating beautiful, responsive web applications using modern technologies like React, JavaScript, and more.

seo.siteDescription: Explore the professional portfolio of Alish Pawn, a frontend web developer and BCA student based in Nepal. View projects, skills, and contact info.

paragraphs: I'm a passionate web developer currently pursuing my Bachelor's in Computer Application (BCA) at Kathmandu College of Technology, affiliated with Tribhuvan University. I'm in my 3rd year, 6th semester, and have been developing my skills in frontend web development.

My journey in web development started with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and has evolved to include modern frameworks like React. I enjoy creating user-friendly, responsive websites and have experience with various tools and platforms including WordPress, Shopify, and DBeaver.

education.description: Completed foundational education with a strong emphasis on core subjects such as English, Mathematics, Science, and Social Studies. Developed discipline, academic consistency, and a base for future academic pursuits.

Gained fundamental knowledge in business practices, economics, accountancy, and management principles. This program helped develop analytical thinking and an understanding of organizational operations.

Currently pursuing an undergraduate degree focused on computer science, software development, database systems, and web technologies. Building strong theoretical foundations and practical skills in programming and IT solutions.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform

projects.description: Android mobile application developed using Java in Android Studio with modern UI/UX design principles.

projects.description: Responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects and skills, built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.description: Creative collection of 404 error pages with unique designs and animations to enhance user experience.

projects.description: Creative collection of code snippets with unique designs and implementations to enhance development workflow.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out!

footer.description: Frontend Web Developer & BCA Student based in Bhaktapur, Nepal.
footer.tagline: Specializing in React, JavaScript, and modern web technologies. Passionate about creating responsive, user-friendly web applications and implementing secure payment integrations.
